title: Former Punjab & Haryana HC Justice Anupinder Singh Grewal appointed NCLT President
description: Former Punjab & Haryana High Court Justice Anupinder Singh Grewal has been appointed as the president of the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT).He has been appointed for a period of five years or till attaining the age of 67 years, whichever is earlier. He succeeds Justice Ramalingam Sudhakar who served as NCLT President with effect from November 1, 2021 and demitted office earlier this year.Born on March 10, 1964, Justice Grewal hails from an agriculturist family in Punjab's Ludhiana dist
